facebook.notes: Primary source — Facebook Groups have the most candid pain expression for this niche

reddit.notes: Anonymous posting = unguarded pain signal. r/Entrepreneur and r/smallbusiness are highest yield.

linkedin.notes: Lower volume, higher intent. Use for business owners explicitly naming coaching struggles.

hubspot.notes: Set portal_id and sequence_id per client in HubSpot connection config

meta_ads.notes: Disabled by default — enable per client when Meta audience targeting is approved

calendly.notes: Used for discovery call CTAs in approved messages
